title: Jil Jil Jinnie - MAGIC SPRAY
desc: Jil Jil gives a magic shrink spray to Munna and Meenu to deal with a wild elephant that created havoc in their village. The children then get caught by Motapippi. Their escape is really comical.

title: Jil Jil Jinnie - MAGICIAN MITTU
desc: The children demand magic from Mittu. Mittu asks for Jil Jil's belt to be used as a prop to show his magic. Jil Jil refuses. But when provoked by the children he gives away his belt to Mittu.

title: Jil Jil Jinnie - Magic Glasses
desc: Himbida and his sidekicks face trouble when Jil Jil stops appearing in the magic mirror. They soon realize the genie is roaming freely, taking advantage of his invisibility to create mischief.
